creator: microlaser@gmail.com
text:
Since you have greater familiarity with sockstat than me please let me know the sockstat flag to find the binary that binds to the port and we can consider this closed if this exists, it is not necessary to duplicate features in FreeBSD, I agree with you if sockstat has this feature it is sufficient, I am more familiar with netstat so I value your input.  Please let me see an example of the flag to find the binary.  Thank you.

Michael
